message:
fix(codegen): Handle init param shadowing class-level attributes

When __init__ parameters have the same name as class-level attributes
(properties, lazy methods), rename the params to avoid Zig shadowing.

Key fixes:
1. wouldShadowMethodInClass now checks class-level assignments
   (property definitions) in addition to method definitions

2. Add allocator discard in lazy methods to fix unused param warnings

3. Also added shadowing detection in genInitMethod and signature.zig
   for comprehensive coverage

This fixes classes like:
  class Rat:
      num = property(_get_num)  # lazy method 'num'
      def __init__(self, num, den):  # param 'num' now becomes 'num_param'
          self.__num = num
